commands: vp exec hello-test # exec binary from node_modules/.bin
vp exec echo hello # basic exec
vp exec -- echo with-separator # explicit -- separator
vp exec node -e "console.log('from node')" # exec node with args
vp exec -c 'echo hello from shell' # shell mode
vp exec --parallel -- echo hello # --parallel with single package should stream output
cd subdir && vp exec ./my-local # resolve relative executable from caller cwd
vp exec # missing command should error
vp exec nonexistent-cmd-12345 # command not found error
vp run foo # vp exec works in package.json scripts
